one_time_description: Specific Land Claim settlement approved in 2020; Nation received $21,428,571 and the right to an increase in territory of 560 acres of land
economic_notes: In 2020 the Nation approved a distribution to members of $3,571,428 to be paid out by March 31, 2021. Nation committed to purchase of Government Business Enterprises to be completed by March 31, 2021 in the amount of $13,175,000 plus closing costs. Kawkawa Lake Resort campground operated. Trans Mountain pipeline income received. Forestry timber rights income received.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) Band has not recorded tangible capital assets per standards required since January 2009 — capital asset register incomplete; (2) Campground financial records were incomplete at year end and revenue was limited to bank deposits. Large one-time land claim settlement of $21,428,571 received in 2020 dominates the financials. Term deposit held First Nations Gaming eligible of $264,790 recorded as deferred revenue. Investments and advances to GBEs of $1,956,439 recorded. Remuneration schedules referenced on pages 27-30 but not legible in provided images.
